request: Give me a full business overview.
search_document:
User Request: Give me a full business overview.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customer Regions
Type: table
Description: Regions with highest customer spending
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue
Title: Product Performance
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance by product category
Title: Order Trends
Type: chart
Description: Trends in order volume over time
Title: Employee Performance
Type: table
Description: Sales performance by employee
Title: Shipping Performance
Type: kpi
Description: Average shipping time

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customer Regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSpending FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID GROUP BY c.Region ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od

sql_queries.title: Product Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Order Trends
sql_queries.description: Trends in order volume over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Shipping Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(julianday(ShippedDate) - julianday(OrderDate)) AS AvgShippingTime FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL
